title: onopordum bracteatum subsp. ilex
intro: Onopordum bracteatum subsp. ilex, also known as the Ilex Thorny Cabbage or Globe Thistle, is a subspecies of the Onopordum bracteatum plant, a type of thistle native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, particularly for its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Onopordum bracteatum subsp. ilex include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
